title: The Lulav and Etrog: Sukkot's Four Species Explained
title_zh: 鲁拉夫与埃特罗格：住棚节的四种植物详解
title_he: הלולב והאתרוג: ארבעת המינים של סוכות מוסברים
author: Torah Light Writing Team
target_audience: Chinese native Mandarin speakers, no background in Judaism
cultural_parallels: Historical period mapping (Zhou Dynasty, Han Dynasty)
learning_objectives: Identify the four species and their biblical sources
Understand the halachic requirements for each species
Learn the proper method of holding and waving the Four Species
Appreciate the symbolism of Jewish unity through the Four Species
Recognize cultural parallels with Chinese traditions
Know practical tips for purchasing and storing the Four Species
